reviews.comment:
Carísimo todo. Las golosinas más caras que en aeropuerto de Ezeiza. Tardaron en atender y no pude usar el baño porque lo estaban limpiando.  Al menos se ve que se toman su tiempo de limpieza!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was incredibly expensive. The sweets were more expensive than at Ezeiza airport. The service was slow, and I couldn't use the restroom because they were cleaning it. At least they seem to take their time cleaning!
